replies.author: @gryffensview
replies.text:
I'm going to add that I'm one of those "stupid weirdos" who affirms Star Wars is, in fact, not dead. How can you kill a story if you have a people who still believe, even if few in number?  However, anything from the Bob Iger Company is not Star Wars. It never will be. It is going to take many years and untold damage until fans finally wrest the "right to own Star Wars" out of the venomous fangs of these psychopaths. I may not be alive to see it, but as a student of history and specifically the history of storytelling, I can see an eventual revival. But not any time soon. 

I'm sure I'm going to have at least one self-righteous "know-it-all" sneer and rant at me that "u iz stupid." I always do.  I'm going to post ahead of time that Az said it best. "You're boring." You provide nothing. You mean nothing. You're yet another needless obstacle in the way of recovery.  We've endured more useless naysayers before, and we'll overcome more, although it would be nice to have a few less obstacles.  Just saying.

That said, in closing we have more of "The Dark Times' ahead. Yes, "The storm's getting worse," but "We'll get through it."

replies.text: She's the former general manager, a woman who was probably only chosen for not being a white man. Still, she's going to be little more than a paper pusher, a check-signer, a meeting-attender, and someone to make merchandise deals with, and someone to get Disney to approve of budgets for Lucasfilm.

replies.author: @Aristocles22
replies.text: Don't worry about her. She's just a glorified pencil-pusher and check-signer. And a way for Disney to say that "a woman is still in charge" of Lucasfilm, even though Filoni is the one really calling the shots on what gets made and how.

replies.author: @gillianmcquarrie6506
replies.text:
No he isn't his star wars is terrible.

Anbore is the second lowest rated Star wars project behind the Acolyte (embarrassing) ever made.

Anbore has had zero impact on the culture and has already been forgotten to time.

Anbor charachters are neither beloved or iconic, hence it has the lowest toy sales of any Star wars project. More people bought Acolyte toy's than they did Anbore.

It has a tiny non existent fanbase on reddit that barley gets any traction or commentary.

It will never be accepted by EU fan's who are the real Fandom and the real Canon which is the Dark forces series.

It was beaten by a re release of ROTS a 20 year old movie which brought in 15× the viewership than Anbore did.

Anbore is trash and won't be remembered fondly in 20 years.

author: @Aristocles22
text:
We've seen this before. If it's true, this is an improvement, but not the sort of salvation we were hoping for, unless Filoni was only pretending to go along with wokeness the entire time and the second he's in charge, he's fixing everything. Nice to imagine, not going to happen. 

Still, Filoni may be willing to stop ruining Star Wars going forward, but it's like slamming the barn door shut after the horses have run off. Too little, too late. Nothing short of a canon reset will do.
